summary: Frontend testing of Added Sets Persistence fix (race condition via inline AsyncStorage read). Tested all 6 specified test cases via Playwright browser automation on web preview.

test_results.TEST_1_added_set_persists_after_tab_swit: PASS - Added set (11) remains visible after Schedule→Today tab switch. Inline AsyncStorage read in useFocusEffect working correctly.
test_results.TEST_2_multiple_adds_persist: PARTIAL PASS - Added set to first exercise (set 11) persisted after tab switch. Second exercise test blocked by strict mode selector violation (both exercises expanded showing 2 'Add Set' buttons). Core persistence logic verified working.
test_results.TEST_3_force_quit_reopen: NOT TESTABLE - Requires native Expo Go device. Full-rebuild path (line ~1946 in today.tsx) inline AsyncStorage read is code-verified correct.
test_results.TEST_4_remove_added_set_persists: PASS - Added set then removed it; after tab switch the removed set did NOT reappear. saveAddedSetsToStorage in handleRemoveSet working correctly.
test_results.TEST_5_normal_sets_regression: PASS - Originally prescribed/logged sets (1-7, showing green checkmarks) remain logged after tab switch. Added-sets changes did not affect existing set persistence.
test_results.TEST_6_console_diagnostic: PASS - Zero '[Today] Failed to restore added sets:' warning messages during all test operations. No console errors related to AsyncStorage restore.

critical_code_review_comments: Code verified: Inline AsyncStorage.getItem(ADDED_SETS_KEY) correctly awaited at line ~1816 (re-sync branch) and line ~1946 (full-rebuild branch) — race condition fix is properly implemented.
Exercise ID matching (addedByEx[ex.id]) verified working in web preview.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Added sets persistence fix tested and working. TEST 2 (multi-exercise) partially blocked by selector issue when multiple exercises expanded; not a functional issue. All critical paths (add→persist, remove→not reappear, normal sets unaffected) verified.
